display_text: Arcane Boots, Cost: 1400: Active ability Replenish restores 150 mana to all allies within a large 1200 radius. Also grants a passive aura providing +1 mana regeneration to nearby allies. A core mana-battery for spell-heavy teams. Stats: CD: 55s, Cost: 1400, Radius: 1200, Mana Restore: 150.

display_text: Arcane Boots, Cost: 1400: Provides +45 movement speed and +0.25 base mana regeneration. Built from Boots and Ring of Basilius, transitioning early mana sustain into a team-wide mana restoration tool.
search_text: arcane boots stats, movement speed, mana regen stats, boots upgrade, basilius upgrade, arcane cost, mana item stats, support boots, Arcane Boots

display_text: Arcane Boots, Cost: 1400: Strong teamfight utility item for sustaining allies' mana pools. The aura passively helps during sieges and stand-offs, while the active can enable key follow-up spells after an engagement. Its value scales with the number of spellcasting allies.
search_text: teamfight mana support, mana aura, team utility, siege sustain, mana sustain in fight, support teamfight item, mana for team, team buff item, Arcane Boots

display_text: Arcane Boots, Cost: 1400: Ideal for support heroes who need mobility and want to empower their team. Excellent in lineups with high mana-cost abilities or long-duration spell spammers. Counters strategies reliant on mana burn by quickly replenishing pools. The active does not work on Meepo clones.
search_text: support boots, mana intensive lineup, mana burn counter, support mobility, meepo counter, team mana, mana spammer support, hero mana sustain, Arcane Boots
